🫶 Welcome

Welcome to Solana Suite! This platform offers a variety of features built on the Solana blockchain.

A product of A Few Bad Newbies LLC., created by William Simmons.

Use the icons below to navigate to different sections.


Icon Meaning

🏠 = A Few Bad Newbies LLC. Central Hub

🫶 = Welcome Card

🤖 = Parameter-based Automated TradeBot using only contract addresses submitted by the user.

🚀 = Custom SPL Token Launchpad with bonding curve, SPL Token Trading, and SPL Token Validator. Token deployment costs $7 USD in SOL equivalent. Creators receive 0.5% of all transactions as passive SOL tax to the address used to deploy that token.

🎮 = Arcade (Ultimate Tetris with crisp visuals, NewbieVerse RPG with full-screen iframe, Tap to Earn with grid reset preserving points)

💬 = SocialFi (Profile, Feed, New Post, Messages, Friends, Tipping, and Chatroom)

🏆 = Leaderboard

📚 = All Solana Suite documentation, including an extensive reverse KYC.

⚙️ = User Settings and Wallet Management.

🌐 = Retro Theme

🚀 Launchpad

Token creators receive 0.5% SOL on all transactions for the token’s lifetime.

Total Parameters: 0%

Remaining: 3%

🎮 Arcade

Welcome to the Solana Suite Arcade! Play fun games like Ultimate Tetris, NewbieVerse RPG, and Tap to Earn to earn Airdrop Points.

Airdrop Points are rewards you get for playing games. In Tetris, you earn 1 point for every 1000 points scored. In the RPG, you earn 1 point for every 5000 gold collected. In Tap to Earn, you earn 1 point for every 1000 unique taps. These points boost your rank on the Leaderboard, unlocking bigger shares of free token airdrops!

Playing is simple and free! The more you play, the more points you earn, increasing your airdrop rewards. Check the Arcade Guide in Docs for tips to maximize your points.

Ultimate Tetris
Score: 0 | Level: 1 | Airdrop Points: 0 | Combo: 0x | Bonus: None

📚 Docs

User Agreement

This User Agreement (“Agreement”) is a legal agreement between you (“User”) and Solana Suite (“Company”), a product of A Few Bad Newbies LLC., governing your use of the Solana Suite platform.

1. Acceptance of Terms: By accessing or using the platform, including TradeBot, Launchpad, SocialFi, Arcade, or Leaderboard, you agree to be bound by this Agreement. Non-compliance requires discontinuing use.

2. Eligibility: Users must be at least 18 years old and legally capable of entering this Agreement.

3. Account Registration: To access certain features, you must register an account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information and to keep your account credentials secure.

4. Prohibited Activities: You agree not to engage in illegal or unauthorized activities, including fraud, money laundering, hacking, spamming SocialFi, or exploiting Arcade features.

5. Termination: The Company reserves the right to terminate or suspend your account at any time for violations of this Agreement without notice.

6. Limitation of Liability: The Company is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from platform use, including financial losses in trading or gaming.

7. Governing Law: Governed by New York, USA laws, excluding conflict of law principles.

8. Amendments: Updates to this Agreement are effective upon posting. Continued use implies acceptance.

Privacy Policy

Solana Suite, operated by A Few Bad Newbies LLC., prioritizes your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

1. Information Collection: We collect information you provide during registration, such as name, email address, wallet address, and SocialFi profile data (e.g., posts, reactions).

2. Use of Information: Data is used to provide and improve services, including transaction processing, SocialFi feeds, Arcade progress tracking, and compliance with legal obligations.

3. Data Sharing: Information may be shared with third-party service providers (e.g., blockchain nodes, analytics) under strict confidentiality agreements to facilitate services.

4. Data Security: We implement industry-standard encryption to protect your information, but no system is fully secure. Never share private keys.

5. User Rights: You may request access, updates, or deletion of your data via AFBN.Contact@gmail.com.

6. Cookies: Cookies enhance functionality (e.g., saving RPG progress) and analytics. See Cookie Policy for details.

7. Policy Updates: Updates are posted on the platform. Continued use signifies acceptance of the updated policy.

Cookie Policy

Solana Suite uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience across all features.

1. What Are Cookies?: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to remember preferences and track interactions, like SocialFi settings or Arcade saves.

2. Types of Cookies: We use session cookies (temporary) and persistent cookies (stored until expired/deleted) for functionality and analytics.

3. Purpose: Cookies personalize feeds, save game progress, analyze usage patterns, and optimize performance.

4. Managing Cookies: Disable cookies in browser settings, but this may impair features like SocialFi posting or RPG autosaving.

5. Third-Party Cookies: Analytics or blockchain services may set cookies, governed by their policies.

6. Contact: Email AFBN.Contact@gmail.com for cookie-related inquiries.

Legal Disclaimer

Solana Suite, by A Few Bad Newbies LLC., offers informational and transactional services.

1. No Warranty: The platform is provided “as is” without any express or implied warranties.

2. Risk Disclosure: Trading and investing in cryptocurrencies, token creation, and gaming (e.g., Arcade quests) involve significant financial risks. Users assume full responsibility.

3. No Financial Advice: Platform content, including SocialFi posts or Leaderboard data, is not financial advice. Consult professionals for investment decisions.

4. Third-Party Links: The platform may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their content or practices.

5. Limitation of Liability: A Few Bad Newbies LLC. is not liable for losses from platform use, including trading losses or data breaches.

Know Your Company

Company Name: A Few Bad Newbies LLC

Founder: William H. Simmons

New York State DOS ID: 6606204

Email Contact: AFBN.Contact@gmail.com

Who We Are

A Few Bad Newbies LLC is a one-man-powered creative tech movement founded by William H. Simmons, a self-taught developer who built everything from the ground up using just a smartphone. No investors, no shortcuts—just pure grind, code, and vision.

This isn’t a corporate product; it’s a mission to innovate in blockchain, gaming, and community development.

Our Mission

We aim to democratize blockchain technology, making trading, gaming, and social interaction accessible and transparent to everyone, with no gatekeeping or false promises.

Why the Name?

“A Few Bad Newbies” stems from our roots as an underdog esports team, symbolizing resilience and ambition. The goal is to take overlooked talent, give them a platform, and turn them into champions. Esports remains the heart of AFBN, with plans for team-building as funding allows.

What We Stand For

Transparency. Accessibility. Purpose. AFBN is committed to lowering barriers to entry and creating a space where creators, gamers, and developers can grow.

What We Offer

All of the following are 100% FREE:

  • Clan & Gaming Community
  • Competition Ladder
  • Tournaments
  • Streaming Network
  • Affiliation Program
  • Merch Giveaways
  • Anime Content
  • Browser Games
  • Music Player
  • Membership
  • AR/VR Virtual Meeting Space & Art Exhibit

These free features create a foundation for community growth.

Optional Add-Ons & Premium Features

As part of our phased roadmap toward a clean energy movement and Web3 ecosystem, we offer:

  • Exclusive Merchandise
  • Promotional Packages
  • $BOAR Token integration
  • Additional premium features

These optional tools allow users to support the mission and benefit from the platform’s growth.

Know Your Creator

Name: William H. Simmons

Title: Founder & Sole Operator

Location: New York, USA

Contact: AFBN.Contact@gmail.com

William is the sole developer, designer, writer, and builder behind AFBN. Self-taught and driven by innovation, inclusion, and independence, he crafted every feature and line of code without external funding to serve the community.

TradeBot Guide

The TradeBot is an automated trading tool in Solana Suite that helps you trade Solana tokens without constant monitoring.

What is the TradeBot?

The TradeBot automatically buys and sells tokens based on your settings, interacting with decentralized exchanges like Raydium or 1inch. It monitors token prices in real-time, using profit and loss margins to decide when to sell.

Setting Up the TradeBot

Follow these steps to configure and start the TradeBot:

  • Connect Your Wallet: In User Settings, click “Connect Wallet” and select your preferred wallet (e.g., Phantom, Solflare, Backpack).
  • Navigate to TradeBot: Open the TradeBot window via the taskbar icon (🤖).
  • Add Token Contract Addresses: In the Contract Validator tab, enter token contract addresses (e.g., $BOAR: BSt36411RV6PVmP5bgR6a5mZv7G1TnR1HevxdE85wCng). Click “Validate” to check safety via RugCheck API (score >50% required).
  • Configure Trading Settings:
    • Concurrent Tokens (1-25): Number of tokens traded simultaneously (e.g., 5).
    • SOL per Trade (0.003-10,000 SOL): SOL amount per trade (e.g., 0.1 SOL).
    • Profit Margin ($0.50-$50,000): USD profit target for selling (e.g., $1).
    • Loss Margin (5%-75%): Percentage loss threshold for selling (e.g., 5%).
  • Authorize and Start Trading: Click “Authorize” to approve permissions, then “Start Trading” to begin (max 1500 trades/day).
  • Monitor Activity: The Trade Log shows buys, sells, and errors. Errors repeating within 3 minutes show a counter (e.g., “Network error (3)”).

How the TradeBot Works

  • Token Validation: Uses RugCheck API to assess safety score, liquidity lock, ownership, honeypot risk, and tax structure. Tokens scoring <50% are rejected.
  • Buying Tokens: Buys tokens with specified SOL (e.g., 0.1 SOL) via 1inch or Raydium, ensuring sufficient SOL for fees (0.000005 SOL).
  • Monitoring Prices: Fetches prices every second using CoinGecko, with Raydium as a fallback, converting to USD for profit/loss calculations.
  • Selling Tokens: Sells when profit margin (e.g., $1) or loss margin (e.g., 5%) is met, logging each trade.
  • Concurrent Limits: Limits trades to the concurrent token setting, waiting for round-trips (buy-sell) to complete.
  • SOL Availability: Checks SOL balance before trades, stopping if insufficient.
  • Fallback Endpoints: Uses multiple Solana RPCs and APIs with automatic fallbacks for reliability.

Trade Log System

  • Successful Trades: Logs buys/sells (e.g., “Bought 0.1 SOL of token at $0.05”).
  • Error Handling: Logs errors with timestamps; repeats within 3 minutes append a counter.
  • Clearing the Log: Click “Clear Log” to reset.

Tips for Using the TradeBot

  • Start with small SOL amounts (e.g., 0.1 SOL) and profit margins (e.g., $1) to test.
  • Balance risk: Lower loss margins (5%) cut losses fast; higher margins (25%) allow rebounds but risk more.
  • Ensure sufficient SOL for trades and fees.
  • Monitor the Trade Log for errors (e.g., persistent network issues may require checking your connection).
  • Set concurrent tokens based on SOL balance to avoid overtrading.

Need Help?

Contact AFBN.Contact@gmail.com for assistance. Happy trading!

Launchpad Guide

The Launchpad allows creation, trading, and monitoring of Solana SPL tokens with customizable parameters. This guide is under construction, but here’s an overview.

Creating a Token

  • Set Parameters:
    • Token Name and Symbol: Choose unique identifiers.
    • Total Supply (1M-10B): Set total token issuance.
    • Burn % (0-3%): Percentage burned per transaction.
    • Commission % (0-3%): Creator fee per transaction.
    • Anti-Whale % (0-2%): Limit large transactions.
    • Snipe % (0-3%): Prevent early sniping for fair trading.
  • Deployment: Deploy for $7 USD in SOL. Total parameters (burn + commission + anti-whale) must not exceed 3%.
  • Creator Benefits: Earn 0.5% SOL tax on all token transactions indefinitely.

Trading Tokens

  • Search and Filter: Find tokens by contract address or sort by creation date, market cap, or holders.
  • View Profiles: Review token details (supply, market cap, holders).
  • Buy/Sell: Trade with SOL, respecting token parameters like anti-whale limits.

Market Feeds

Track real-time buy/sell activities and new token deployments.

Tips

  • Align parameters with token goals to attract traders.
  • Monitor feeds for market trends.
  • Contact AFBN.Contact@gmail.com for support.

SocialFi Guide

SocialFi integrates social networking with blockchain, enabling profiles, posts, tipping, and real-time chat via a dedicated Chatroom.

Getting Started

  • Connect Wallet: Link a wallet (e.g., Phantom, Solflare, Backpack) to authenticate your profile.
  • Create Profile: Set a username and bio (under construction).
  • Navigate Tabs: Access Profile, Feed, New Post, Messages, Friends, Tipping, and Chatroom tabs for a full-screen experience.

Using SocialFi

  • Posting: Share updates or comments (max 280 characters) in the Feed tab. Posts are stored on-chain for transparency.
  • Reacting: React to posts or comments with emoji reactions (e.g., 👍, ❤️).
  • Commenting: Comment on posts to join discussions.
  • Tipping: Send SOL tips to creators via wallet transactions.
  • Chatting: Join real-time discussions in the Chatroom tab, powered by Minnit.
  • Moderation: Report or delete inappropriate posts or chat messages using feed or chatroom controls.

Best Practices

  • Keep posts and chat messages concise and respectful to foster community.
  • Verify wallet balance before tipping.
  • Regularly check feeds and the chatroom for updates and interactions.

Troubleshooting

If posting, tipping, or chatting fails, check wallet connection and SOL balance. Ensure the Chatroom iframe loads correctly. Email AFBN.Contact@gmail.com for help.

Arcade Guide

The Arcade offers Ultimate Tetris with crisp visuals, NewbieVerse RPG with a full-screen iframe, and Tap to Earn with a resettable grid, all integrated with blockchain.

Tetris

A classic block-stacking game with sharp, pixel-perfect pieces. Earn points for clearing lines, contributing to Leaderboard airdrop points.

  • Controls: Use arrow keys to move/rotate blocks, spacebar to drop.
  • Scoring: Clear lines to earn points (1 line = 100 points, 4 lines = 800 points). Every 1000 points earns 1 Leaderboard point.
  • Tips: Plan placements to avoid gaps. Speed increases with level.

NewbieVerse RPG

Explore a fantasy world in a full-screen iframe, battle monsters, complete quests, and manage inventory.

  • Character Creation: Choose a class (Werewolf, Vampire, Mage, Hunter) with unique stats and abilities.
  • Gameplay:
    • Move between rooms (north, south, east, west) to explore.
    • Interact with NPCs for quests (e.g., retrieve items like Tyrant Crown).
    • Engage in auto-combat with monsters, using weapons and spells.
    • Manage inventory (equip weapons/armor, use consumables like Health Potions).
  • Progression: Earn XP, gold, and quest points to level up and improve stats. Every 5000 gold earns 1 Leaderboard point.
  • Saving: Progress autosaves every 30 seconds via cookies or local storage.

Tap to Earn

A simple tapping game where you tap dots on a 10×10 grid to earn points. Use the ‘Reset Board’ button to clear the grid while preserving points.

  • Controls: Tap or click dots on the grid. You must tap a different dot each time to prevent bot abuse.
  • Scoring: Every 1000 unique taps earns 1 Leaderboard point.
  • Tips: Tap strategically across the grid to maximize unique taps. Reset the board to start fresh, keeping your points intact.

Best Practices

  • Play regularly to accumulate points for airdrops.
  • Equip weapons and armor to boost combat effectiveness in RPG.
  • Accept NPC quests to earn rewards and quest points.
  • Monitor HP and mana during RPG combat to avoid defeat.
  • Vary tap locations in Tap to Earn to ensure unique taps.

Troubleshooting

If the game freezes, progress doesn’t save, or the RPG iframe fails to load, clear browser cookies or contact AFBN.Contact@gmail.com.

Leaderboard Guide

The Leaderboard tracks points for airdrop rewards. More points improve your tier and token share.

What is the Leaderboard?

The Leaderboard ranks users by points earned through Solana Suite activities, determining airdrop tier placement for free token distributions.

How to Earn Points

  • Play Tetris: Earn 1 point per 1000 Tetris points (e.g., 5000 Tetris points = 5 Leaderboard points).
  • Play RPG: Earn 1 point per 5000 gold in NewbieVerse RPG, persisting across game resets.
  • Play Tap to Earn: Earn 1 point per 1000 unique taps in the Tap to Earn game.

Airdrop Tiers

  • Tier 1 (50-5,000 Points): Share 15% of airdropped tokens.
  • Tier 2 (5,001-25,000 Points): Share 20% of tokens.
  • Tier 3 (25,001-150,000 Points): Share 25% of tokens.
  • Tier 4 (150,001+ Points): Share 40% of tokens, the largest share.

Airdrop Rewards

  • How It Works: New tokens are periodically created, with 50% of supply distributed based on tiers.
  • Your Share: Higher tiers yield larger token shares (e.g., Tier 4 shares 40%).
  • Using Tokens: Trade on Launchpad, tip in SocialFi, or hold for future value.

Tips

  • Play Tetris, RPG, and Tap to Earn regularly to steadily earn points.
  • Check your tier in the Leaderboard window to track progress.
  • Contact AFBN.Contact@gmail.com for point or tier issues.
